hooks.prompt: Check if any code files (in server/src/, client/src/, shared/src/, server/prisma/) were created or modified in this session. If so, verify that the relevant documentation files (docs/architecture.md, docs/deployment.md, docs/adding-features.md, README.md) were also updated to reflect those changes. Focus on: new API endpoints, new DB models, new env vars, new pages/routes, new auth/permission changes, new patterns. If docs were NOT updated but should have been, output JSON: {"decision": "block", "reason": "Documentation not updated. The following docs need changes: [list specific files and what needs updating]."}. If docs are up-to-date or no doc-worthy code changes were made, output nothing.
